label: Multi-hop research (requires synthesizing across sources)
prompt: Search for which countries have passed national AI laws, and for each one, search for when the law took effect. Tell me: how many sources did you draw from? Were you able to find dates for all countries? What gaps or uncertainties remain?
interpreted_response:
As of March 2026, several countries have enacted national artificial intelligence (AI) laws. Below is a summary of these countries, the titles of their respective laws, and their effective dates:

| Country           | AI Law Title                                                                                   | Effective Date           |
|-------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------|
| European Union    | Artificial Intelligence Act (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689)                                       | August 1, 2024           |
| South Korea       | Framework Act on the Development of Artificial Intelligence and Establishment of Trust        | January 2026             |
| Italy             | Comprehensive AI Legislation (specific title not provided)                                     | September 2025           |
| China             | Regulations on Network Data Security Management                                                | January 2025             |
| China             | Measures for the Identification of Artificial Intelligence-Generated Synthetic Content        | September 1, 2025        |
| United States     | Colorado AI Act (Consumer Protections for Artificial Intelligence)                             | June 30, 2026            |
| United States     | Texas Responsible Artificial Intelligence Governance Act (TRAIGA)                              | January 1, 2026          |
| Taiwan            | Artificial Intelligence Basic Act                                                                | December 23, 2025        |
| Israel            | National AI Policy (specific title not provided)                                               | December 2023            |
| Israel            | Framework Convention on Artificial Intelligence and Human Rights, Democracy, and the Rule of Law | September 5, 2024        |

**Sources Consulted:**

The information above was compiled from the following sources:

1. ([en.wikipedia.org](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Artificial_Intelligence_Act?utm_source=openai))
2. ([arakiplaw.com](https://arakiplaw.com/en/insight/2665/?utm_source=openai))
3. ([cimplifi.com](https://www.cimplifi.com/resources/the-updated-state-of-ai-regulations-for-2025/?utm_source=openai))
4. ([en.wikipedia.org](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Colorado_AI_Act?utm_source=openai))
5. ([en.wikipedia.org](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/TRAIGA?utm_source=openai))
6. ([en.wikipedia.org](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Framework_Convention_on_Artificial_Intelligence?utm_source=openai))
7. ([hai.stanford.edu](https://hai.stanford.edu/assets/files/hai_ai-index-report-2024_chapter_7.pdf?utm_source=openai))
8. ([hai.stanford.edu](https://hai.stanford.edu/assets/files/hai_ai-index-report-2025_chapter6_final.pdf?utm_source=openai))
9. ([apnews.com](https://apnews.com/article/155157e2be2e42d0f1acca33983d8c82?utm_source=openai))
10. ([windowscentral.com](https://www.windowscentral.com/artificial-intelligence/italy-ai-legislation-deepfakes-youth?utm_source=openai))

**Observations:**

- The European Union's AI Act is the first comprehensive AI legislation globally, effective from August 1, 2024. ([en.wikipedia.org](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Artificial_Intelligence_Act?utm_source=openai))

- South Korea's AI law, enacted on December 26, 2024, is set to take effect in January 2026. ([arakiplaw.com](https://arakiplaw.com/en/insight/2665/?utm_source=openai))

- Italy's AI legislation, effective from September 2025, is among the first in the EU to implement comprehensive AI laws. ([windowscentral.com](https://www.windowscentral.com/artificial-intelligence/italy-ai-legislation-deepfakes-youth?utm_source=openai))

- China has implemented AI-related regulations, including the Regulations on Network Data Security Management in January 2025 and the Measures for the Identification of Artificial Intelligence-Generated Synthetic Content effective from September 1, 2025. ([arakiplaw.com](https://arakiplaw.com/en/insight/2665/?utm_source=openai))

- In the United States, Colorado's AI Act is set to take effect on June 30, 2026, and Texas's TRAIGA on January 1, 2026. ([en.wikipedia.org](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Colorado_AI_Act?utm_source=openai))

- Taiwan's Artificial Intelligence Basic Act was passed on December 23, 2025. ([arakiplaw.com](https://arakiplaw.com/en/insight/2665/?utm_source=openai))

- Israel unveiled its first comprehensive national AI policy in December 2023. ([en.wikipedia.org](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Regulation_of_artificial_intelligence?utm_source=openai))

- Israel also signed the Framework Convention on Artificial Intelligence and Human Rights, Democracy, and the Rule of Law on September 5, 2024. ([en.wikipedia.org](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Framework_Convention_on_Artificial_Intelligence?utm_source=openai))

**Gaps and Uncertainties:**

- Some countries have enacted AI-related laws or policies without specifying effective dates. For instance, Israel's comprehensive national AI policy was unveiled in December 2023, but its effective date is not specified. ([en.wikipedia.org](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Regulation_of_artificial_intelligence?utm_source=openai))

- The specific titles of Italy's comprehensive AI legislation and Israel's national AI policy are not provided in the available sources.

- While the European Union's AI Act is effective from August 1, 2024, some provisions will be enforced in phases over the following years. ([en.wikipedia.org](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Artificial_Intelligence_Act?utm_source=openai))

- The United States has multiple state-level AI regulations, such as Colorado's AI Act and Texas's TRAIGA, but a comprehensive federal AI law has not been enacted as of March 2026.

In summary, while several countries have enacted national AI laws, the landscape is evolving, and some details remain uncertain or unspecified.
